name: Grant Isaac
background: Grant Isaac is Executive Vice-President and Chief Financial Officer. He joined Cameco in 2009 and has held various executive roles including Senior Vice-President, Corporate Strategy and Vice-President, Corporate Strategy and Business Development. Before joining Cameco, he was the Dean of the Edwards School of Business at the University of Saskatchewan.
